symbols.name: visit_identifier
symbols.docstring: Handle an identifier that is not in a declaration context.

symbols.name: visit_call
symbols.docstring: Handle function calls — the function name gets a CALL reference.

symbols.name: visit_attribute
symbols.docstring: Handle non-call attribute access like ``self.x`` or ``obj.y``.

symbols.name: receiver_metadata
symbols.docstring:
Walk left from an attribute node to find the receiver root.

    For ``a.b.c``: returns (resolved_symbol_id_of_a, ['a', 'b']).
    For ``f().bar``: chain is broken by the call — returns (None, None).
    For ``unknown.bar`` where ``unknown`` is not in scope: returns (None, ['unknown']).

symbols.name: resolve_self_attribute
symbols.docstring: Try to resolve ``self.attr`` or ``cls.attr`` to a class member.
